titleStmt.title: SII 20.162: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 162. (B.K. No. 70 of 1938-39.) TUṄGAḶ, JAMKHANDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab near the Paramānanda temple outside the village.

summary.p: The record is badly damaged and the date-portion is lost, except the week-day, which was Thursday. Towards the end is contained another date which also is partially preserved, viz., the 5th year, Khara, eclipse. The regnal year is apparently of the same king.

The inscription seems to record a gift of land for the benefit of a temple (name lost) by Mahāpradhāna Chiddarasa, Mahāprabhu Chauḍapa-Bhaṭṭōpādhyāya of agrahāra Tuṁguḷa, and others. The details of the gift are lost.
It also registers a gift by a Dēvarasa and his brother (name lost) made for the benefit of the temple of Chennakēśavadēva.
The king is stated to be ruling from Modeganūru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaurīnāyakau viśvaṁrakṣatāṁ viśvaśi(kṣa)kau yacchāsanaṁ narēṁdrāṇāṁ surēṁdra syāpi
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī pṛthvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramē
jarapuravarādhīśvaraṁ suvarṇnavṛṣabhadhvajaṁ ḍamarugatūryyanirgghōṣaṇaṁ kaḷa curi
maḷamārttaṁḍaṁ śrīmatu bhujabaḷacakravartti rāyamurāri sōvidēva
jyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttaṁ modaganūra nele
khasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamire . śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ sēnā
ṇaṁbaḍe nāḍadhikāri ciddarasadaṁḍanāyaka pramukha śrīkaraṇaṁgaḷuṁ ©
masvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇa mōnānuṣṭāna japasamādhiśīlasaṁpannarappa śrī
riyagrahāraṁ tuṁguḷa mahāprabhu cauḍapa bhaṭṭōpā
vaśēṣamahājanaṁgaḷuṁ śrīma śrīmatkaḷacuriya
rāyamurāri sōvidē saṁvatsarada Ā
ti bṛhaspativārada moṟeganū
kaṇa bhaṭṭōpā va bhaṭṭōpādhyā
davaḷige bāciya
ra naḍuve pratiṣThe
padīpanaivēdyake
rṇnōddhārakke
vaṭṭeyiṁ
keyi mata grahāraṁ
dōṭadiṁ
biṭṭa matta
© svasti samasta
mahēśvara bāṇa
sīrruhamattamadhukaraṁ
ṇapuravarādhīśvaraṁ Udāra
maṇi nuḍidante gaṁḍaṁ kadanapracaṁḍa
prasādaṁ dānavinōdaṁ nāmādi
dēvarasanuṁ tadanujaṁ kumāra
śrī caṁnakēśavadēvarggaṁ gaṁdha dhū
vitrakkaṁ khaṁḍasphuṭitajīrnnō
geyyoḷage śrīmūlasthā
ḷika biṭṭa keyyiṁ baḍaga
ṟumaṁ © svasti śrī kaḷa ma
vavarṣada 5 neya kha
haṇadaṁdu tatsutaṁ śrī
vidēvarasanuṁ śrī manma
tāraṁbaraṁ sarva
Digital edition of SII 20.162 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
